title: rubus bellus
intro: Rubus bellus, also known as the beautiful raspberry or fragrant raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus bellus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Rubus bellus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and provide relief from fever.
